what_it_does: Records a raised signal that the operator decided the global card-visuals-source question as 'Both — family underneath, story on top' and states that work gated on that decision may resume.
observations: Title and body both name the chosen option 'Both — family underneath, story on top'
Created and updated timestamps are identical
History has a single 'filed' transition from null to raised by operator
Channel and thread fields are empty strings
standouts: It is a decision.decided signal for a global design decision
Chosen option combines two visual sources with explicit layering order
It explicitly authorizes gated work to RESUME
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, type, source, state, title, author, timestamps, links, and history
References external decision via decision:// URI and self via board:// URI
Markdown body restates the decision and its effect
notes: A timestamped operator decision signal that settles card visuals as a combined family/story layer and tells gated work it can resume.
questions: What concrete UI elements do 'family' and 'story' refer to?
Which specific work items or lanes are gated on decision://global/card-visuals-source?
Who or what performs the actual resume step?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches what it does: it records the decided option and signals that gated work can resume.
intention_signals: To finalize and broadcast a global design choice so downstream implementation can proceed with a specific combined visual arrangement.
novelty: It treats a design decision as a resumable gate and encodes the chosen option as a layered composition rather than a single source.
contribution: Provides a dated, attributable decision record that links a global decision URI to a selected option and carries an explicit resume trigger for gated work.
summary_for_embedding: A raised noticeboard signal recording the operator's decision that card visuals shall use both family and story sources with family underneath and story on top, allowing gated work to resume.
intention_for_embedding: To notify the system that the card-visuals-source decision is settled and downstream work may proceed.
